chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 60 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.537/2016. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.538/2016. 04.02.2026 Mr. Khalid Mahmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Muteen Alam, Director and Mr. Rahat Naseem, Assistant Director, I&I, FBR, Karachi. Mr. Muteen Alam, Director I&I, FBR, Karachi, is present and does not press the reference application, which is hereby dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
